content: VM provisioning is taking 3 days. 12 tickets in queue. No self-service path. Number one pain.
Spark pipeline failed, spent 4 hours determining if infra or code issue. Need lineage across the stack.
Need AI anomaly detection before VMware migration starts. This is our Q1 blocker.
CMDB is wrong within hours of any change. We stopped trusting it. Automatic CMDB accuracy would make me a champion for this platform.
Last migration took down 3 dependent services nobody knew about. Need dependency map before moving anything.
